info.title: Submit Delivery Receipt API
info.description:
Submits **end customer registration** details to the John Deere Warranty System and can **register a machine to the dealership** when the unit is taken in on trade. The legacy SOAP **Submit Delivery Receipt** operation maps to this REST API; use your **SOAP-to-REST field mapping** and **REST API FAQ** for exact field names and values.

The request body must contain **at least one** valid field.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

SubmitDeliveryReceiptRequest.description: Payload to create a **DealerInput** entity in **DealerInputSet** for customer registration and optional trade-in registration. Include **at least one** valid field per your program (see SOAP-to-REST mapping). Additional properties are accepted per the underlying OData contract.

dealerAccount.description: Dealer account identifier when required for the submission context.

pin.description: Product identification number (PIN) for the machine when applicable.

serialNumber.description: Machine serial number when required for registration or trade-in.

tradeInPin.description: PIN for a machine taken in on trade, when registering it to the dealership.

SubmitDeliveryReceiptResponse.description: Response after the delivery receipt / registration is processed. Additional fields may appear per entity type.

status.description: Processing or entity status when returned by the service.

confirmationId.description: Reference or confirmation identifier when returned.

message.example: The request body must include at least one valid field.

post.description:
Submits **end customer registration** to the warranty system via **DealerInputSet**. Optionally supports **trade-in** machine registration for the dealership. The body must contain **at least one** valid field.

**Sandbox example:** `POST https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/DbsSubmitDelReceipt/DealerInputSet`

**Production:** Use `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `DbsSubmitDelReceipt`).

200.description: Registration processed; response may include confirmation or entity details.

400.description: Bad request — empty body, no valid fields, or validation failure.

error.message: The request body must include at least one valid field.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
